rationale: Bug hunt C16 revealed critical pattern: C16 code changes were NEVER PUSHED to main (only status JSONs committed). Same failure as C8/C9. BUG-027: _effects.apply_run_rewards() still present at controller L666 — player gets 2x Anam, 2x total_runs, 2x run_history, 2x echo_memory. BUG-028: build_context_enrichment() missing echo_memory/tension_zone/convergence_zone data for LLM narrative callbacks. Both re-fixed. Feature: 3rd GM few-shot example for end-game (PROGRESS_MISSION + high rep swings per q-20260415-005). Also discovered that PROGRESS_MISSION effects from GM LLM were silently dropped by _try_parse_effects_dict() because it requires 'amount' key but PROGRESS_MISSION uses 'step'. Added explicit handler.
next_cycle_plan: Bug hunt C17 (verify all 4 files: controller double-reward gone, echo_memory flowing to LLM, PROGRESS_MISSION parsing correctly). Then feature: GFC wrap BroceliandeForest3D (q-20260415-011) — extend GameFlowController to orchestrate 3D forest scene + hub transitions.
